seoTitle: Murray Upper vs Murrigal — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Murray Upper and Murrigal. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Murray Upper vs Murrigal: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Murray Upper and Murrigal.
heading: Murray Upper vs Murrigal — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Murray Upper, Queensland and Murrigal, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Murray Upper has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Murrigal (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Murray Upper or Murrigal safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Murray Upper has a flood risk score of 36/100, while Murrigal scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Murray Upper scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Murrigal scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Murray Upper or Murrigal?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Murray Upper has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.27% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
